cleanup(): void;

members.name: createDocument
members.content:
Create emulated `Document` for server environment. Does not implement the full browser `document` and `window` API. This api may be removed in the future. ```typescript export declare function createDocument(opts?: MockDocumentOptions): Document; ```
Parameter Type Description
opts [MockDocumentOptions](#mockdocumentoptions) _(Optional)_
**Returns:** Document

members.name: createDOM
members.content:
Creates a compiler-backed DOM harness. ```typescript export declare function createDOM(options?: { html?: string; }): Promise; ```
Parameter Type Description
options { html?: string; } _(Optional)_
**Returns:** Promise<[DOMHarness](#domharness)>

members.name: createWindow
members.content:
Create emulated `window` useful for testing. ```typescript export declare function createWindow(opts?: MockDocumentOptions): MockWindow; ```
Parameter Type Description
opts [MockDocumentOptions](#mockdocumentoptions) _(Optional)_
**Returns:** [MockWindow](#mockwindow)
